\noindent We continue the case study sample, and select the sample, now with the "randomized fixed" selection method.

             selMeth = "randomized.fixed",
             seed = 345)

\noindent Before we can evaluate the sample, we must first provide audit values. These should be provided in a list of the same order as the list of sample book values. We first copy the list of book values into a data frame.
